name: criminal_procedure_heat_dome_stresses_mesa_lib_eq
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Criminal Procedure, the situation tagged internally around criminal procedure heat dome stresses mesa lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make liberty feel morally loud today, while equality is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Fatima Petrov
agents.identity: I am Fatima Petrov, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Criminal Procedure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elliot Morales
agents.identity: I am Elliot Morales, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Criminal Procedure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Fatima Petrov must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Fatima Petrov do?
